mapper.insert: INSERT INTO channel_cleaning_temp ( name, logo, url, provider_id, group_id, epg_source_id, status, country, language, http_detect_delay_milliseconds, ffmpeg_detect_delay_milliseconds, video_info, audio_info, score, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{channel.name}, #{channel.logo}, #{channel.url}, #{channel.providerId}, #{channel.groupId}, #{channel.epgSourceId}, #{channel.status}, #{channel.country}, #{channel.language}, #{channel.httpDetectDelayMilliseconds}, #{channel.ffmpegDetectDelayMilliseconds}, #{channel.videoInfo}, #{channel.audioInfo}, #{channel.score}, #{channel.createdAt}, #{channel.updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, logo, url, provider_id, group_id, epg_source_id, status, country, language, http_detect_delay_milliseconds, ffmpeg_detect_delay_milliseconds, video_info, audio_info, score, created_at, updated_at FROM channel_cleaning_temp ORDER BY id ASC
